$comment: Project-scoped MCP servers for RadioPad, checked in so the whole team gets them. context7 needs no secret. github expands ${GITHUB_PAT} from your environment (fine-grained PAT for jerryboganda/radiopad: Actions:read, Contents:read, Pull requests+Issues:write) — export it in your shell; it is never committed. See AGENTS.md for the Serena + CodeGraph launch commands (they depend on your local install, so add them per-machine).
